response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and extensive industry experience, this role has critical deal-breaker gaps. He lacks native-level Japanese (a mandatory requirement), has no recent C programming experience (10+ years outdated), and his entire 15-year career focuses on web, cloud, and mobile technologies—not embedded firmware, Linux kernel development, or networking security which are core to this position. The skill and domain misalignment is fundamental rather than gaps that could be quickly bridged.
strengths: Proven ability to master multiple programming languages and technical domains across diverse platforms and industries
Demonstrated expertise in high-performance systems, microservices architecture, and software craftsmanship practices including TDD and CI/CD
Strong technical communication and mentorship skills with fluent English and track record of teaching engineers
concerns: No native Japanese language proficiency (listed as mandatory requirement) with no indication of Japanese capability
C programming experience is 10+ years outdated; recent decade of work is entirely in TypeScript/JavaScript/Node.js, not systems-level programming

Complete absence of experience with embedded firmware, Linux kernel source code modification, security technologies (encryption, authentication, MACsec), or networking protocols (Layer 2/3, SNMP, NETCONF)

key_factors.factor: Embedded systems and C expertise gap
